entries.text: KS trying electrolytes before polo to counter Mounjaro nausea. First test: Friday Feb 27 8am lesson. Compare with Feb 22 nausea episode.
Dropped Page — no longer pursuing that deal. Five confirmed show titles sent to COL team as agreed in Feb 26 meeting.

Electrolytes before polo result: helped a little. Session was medium intensity, KS felt okay. Compare with Feb 22 nausea episode (intense session, no electrolytes). Will test again next Friday for proper comparison at higher intensity.
e-Day Licence can't be logged — road tax renewal blocked, unable to pay. KS emailed LTA/OneMotoring for help. Retroactive logging deadline is tonight (Feb 27). Paper trail started.

KS installed Zapier MCP on her MacBook's Claude Code (Google Sheets, Docs, Drive access). Not yet connected to Janet on Mac Mini. Deferred — revisit when KS wants to push more research/work tasks through Janet.
Claude Code v2.1.59 changelog review — auto memory now official feature (we built our own), MCP OAuth race condition fix relevant to multi-machine setup, /copy command useful for KS's direct coding.

Claude Code completely down since 9:25pm restart — CLAUDECODE=1 env variable blocking CLI spawn (new v2.1.59 nested session check). All messages handled by Ollama fallback, causing slow responses and bad data. Fix: strip CLAUDECODE from child process env in claude-runner.js.
